dropzone.formatHint: Click or drag to select audio files. All decryption is done locally.
error.noOutputDir: Please select an output directory first
tooltip.bitrate: Bitrate controls audio quality. Higher bitrate (e.g. 320k) means better quality but larger files. 128k is acceptable for casual listening, 320k for audiophiles.
tooltip.vbr: Variable Bitrate allocates more data to complex passages and less to simple ones. Produces better quality-to-size ratio than CBR. VBR 0 is highest quality, VBR 9 is smallest file.
tooltip.sampleRate: Sample rate is the number of audio samples per second. 44100 Hz (CD quality) is standard for music. 48000 Hz is used for video. Higher rates preserve more high frequencies but increase file size.
tooltip.bitDepth: Bit depth determines dynamic range. 16-bit (CD quality) is sufficient for most music. 24-bit is used in studio recording for extra headroom. 32-bit float is for professional production.
formatDesc.mp3: MP3 (MPEG-1 Audio Layer 3) — the most widely supported lossy audio format. Uses perceptual coding to reduce file size at minimal quality loss. Parameters: bitrate (128k–320k), sample rate, VBR/CBR.
formatDesc.flac: FLAC (Free Lossless Audio Codec) — lossless compressed audio that retains full original quality. Widely supported across players and devices. Parameters: compression level (0–12), sample rate, bit depth.
formatDesc.wav: WAV (Waveform Audio) — uncompressed PCM audio format with maximum compatibility. Large file size but zero quality loss. Parameters: sample rate, bit depth.
formatDesc.ogg: OGG (Vorbis) — open-source lossy audio format. Generally achieves better quality than MP3 at the same bitrate. Parameters: bitrate, sample rate, VBR.
formatDesc.m4a: M4A (MPEG-4 Audio) — Apple’s AAC-based container format. Good quality at low bitrates, widely used in Apple ecosystem. Parameters: bitrate, sample rate.
formatDesc.aac: AAC (Advanced Audio Coding) — modern lossy codec designed as MP3 successor. Better sound quality than MP3 at equivalent bitrates. Parameters: bitrate, sample rate.
formatDesc.aiff: AIFF (Audio Interchange File Format) — Apple’s uncompressed audio format, similar to WAV. Retains full quality with large file size. Parameters: sample rate, bit depth.
formatDesc.alac: ALAC (Apple Lossless Audio Codec) — Apple’s lossless compression format. Full quality retention with smaller size vs WAV/AIFF. Parameters: sample rate, bit depth.
formatDesc.opus: Opus — modern open-source lossy codec, excels at all bitrates. Superior quality for both speech and music. Parameters: bitrate, sample rate.
